info.title: Food Hygiene Rating Scheme API
info.description: The Food Hygiene Rating Scheme (FHRS) API provides access to food hygiene rating data for establishments across the UK. It includes endpoints for searching establishments, looking up business types, regions, authorities, countries, ratings, and more.
